cc:Work.dc:title: Misc - PhotoFrame
cc:Work.dc:description:
3-layer photo frame with a slot at the top to slide matboard/acrylic/glass over the photo after glue-up.
3-layer photo frame.
Selected excellent features:
* easy to change the photo after glue-up, without disassembling the frame * calculates the ideal matting size for your photo based on ancient Greek mathematics * can make the frame in one piece or split into 4 pieces to save material * can make a frame to fit the piece of glass/acrylic you already have * adds a hole for hanging the frame on the wall
Features available in the mysterious future:
* rounded corners * a stand on the back to display the frame on a table
Created with Boxes.py (https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/) Command line: boxes PhotoFrame Command line short: boxes PhotoFrame
